title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ecom Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
